query:
SELECT 
  SUM(principal_amount) as principal,
  SUM(interest_amount) as interest,
  SUM(fee_amount) as fee,
  SUM(penalty_amount) as penalty,
  SUM(unlock_fee_amount) as unlock_fee,
  SUM(overpaid_amount) as overpaid,
  SUM(bad_debt_amount) as bad_debt,
  SUM(discount_amount) as discount,
  SUM(total_amount) as total_amount,
  COUNT(*) as row_count
FROM debt_collected_cache;
